name: candidate-search
description: AI-powered candidate sourcing: multi-source search + Claude ranking

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.render-build: npm --prefix client ci --include=dev && npm --prefix server ci --include=dev && npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run build && node scripts/copy-client.js
